base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fds_menu_save_named_slots — a ui from 1986 metroid. FDS save-slot name display — Japanese text labels + slot stats. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
